title: Missing Legends [Cobblemon]
description: This datapack aims to bring the full roster of legendary pokemon within a single pack to the cobblemon world with some of its own spawning mechanics as well as with the Myths and Legends Addon.
body:
I created this data pack because I wanted to add models and animations for the legendary Pokemon to the Cobblemon mod.  

I used a couple of mods to make this happen, first of which is the cobblemon rider mod found here: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemonrider](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemonrider)

Most of the spawning mechanics for the datapack are not present and require the myths and legends addon found here: [https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-addon/versions](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-addon/versions)

Neither of these are my mods, I just utilized features from them to make the pack work well.  Full credit for those features go to their respective authors.

The last bit of credit I would like to dish out is to u/DeliWtz on reddit.  He allowed me to take inspiration from his Arceus model which was a massive help.

Currently the pack offers:
- Arceus
- Hoopa
- Genesect
- Miraidon
- Koraidon
- Zekrom
- Reshiram
- Kyuren
- Zygarde
- Lugia
- Ho-Oh

I will be adding more in the future, I just wanted to put this version out so I can get a private server going.

# **How to Install**

Download the latest version from Modrinth, and add the .zip file to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world, to "datapacks" folder.
